title: The Shortcut Is the Signal: Introducing Friction Intelligence
author: Israa, Healert Team
excerpt: The biggest risk in your cluster usually isn't a sophisticated attack — it's the workaround an operator reached for because the platform made the right way harder than the risky one. The problem and the fix.

title: Meet Coral: Why Our Mascot Is an Axolotl
author: Amgad, Healert Team
excerpt: A documentary about a strange Mexican salamander explains our product philosophy better than our pitch deck does — regeneration without scarring, and why friction scores should heal instead of leaving a permanent mark.
